tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: These are the chords for Taylor Swift's new song "Gorgeous" from her album "reputation".

content:
Capo:3


INTRO:

[ch]D[/ch], [ch]A[/ch]


VERSE 1:

[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
According to you I'm stupid, I'm useless, I can't do anything right.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
According to you I'm difficult, hard to please, forever changing my mind.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
   I'm a mess in a dress, can't show up on time, even if it would save my life.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch] (--> Solo)
According to you.         According to you.[/tab]



CHORUS:

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Bm[/ch]                         
But according to him I'm beautiful, incredible, he can't get me out of his head.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
According to him I'm funny, irresistible, everything he ever wanted.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]                               [ch]Bm[/ch]                         
Everything is opposite, I don't feel like stopping it. Baby tell me what I got to lose.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch] (--> Solo)
He's into me for everything I'm not, according to you.[/tab]

 

VERSE 2:
SAME CHORDS AS FIRST VERSE
              
According to you I'm boring, I'm moody, you can't take me any place.
             
According to you I suck at telling jokes cause I always give it away.

   I'm the girl with the worst attention span; you're the boy who puts up with it.
              
According to you.        According to you.



CHORUS:

But according to him I'm beautiful, incredible, he can't get me out of his head.
            
According to him I'm funny, irresistible, everything he ever wanted.
                        
Everything is opposite, I don't feel like stopping it. Baby tell me what I got to lose.
    
He's into me for everything I'm not, according to you.



BRIDGE:

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]F#[/ch]/[ch]Gbm[/ch]
   I need to feel appreciated, like I'm not hated. oh-- no--.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
   Why can't you see me through his eyes?   It's too bad you're making me dizz-ay.[/tab]


SOLO:

[ch]G[/ch], [ch]A[/ch], [ch]Bm[/ch], [ch]D[/ch] 
[ch]G[/ch], [ch]A[/ch], [ch]Bm[/ch], [ch]D[/ch] 


PRE-CHORUS:

[tab] [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]                    
According to me you're stupid, you're useless, you can't do anything right. [/tab]



CHORUS:

                  
But according to him I'm beautiful, incredible, he can't get me out of his head.
           
According to him I'm funny, irresistible, everything he ever wanted.
                        
Everything is opposite, I don't feel like stopping it. Baby tell me what I got to lose.
     
He's into me for everything I'm not, according to you. (you, you) According to you.



OUTTRO: (acoustic guitar)

[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
According to you I'm stupid, I'm useless, I can't do anything right.[/tab]
